---
description: "Use when drafting or refining the Product Requirements Document for the UM Hackathon Domain 2 submission."
name: "Draft PRD"
argument-hint: "Describe the product idea, target user, or source files"
agent: "agent"
---

Draft or refine the PRD for this repository.

Make the document judge-ready and include:

- problem statement
- target user
- business objective and measurable impact
- MVP scope and out-of-scope items
- why Z.AI GLM is required in the core workflow
- prompting or context strategy
- fallback and failure behavior
- performance, cost, assumptions, risks, and open questions

Do not invent facts. Mark unknown items as `UNSPECIFIED` and assumptions as `ASSUMPTION`.
